title: Reality Warping
wikitext:
[[File:Mad Jim Jaspers.jpg|thumb|right|400px|Mad Jim Jaspers (Marvel) is an extremely powerful Reality Warper.]]

==Summary==
'''Reality Warping''' (sometimes called Reality Alteration or Reality Manipulation) is a term used to describe the ability to manipulate reality itself. 

The ability to change reality into how the person in question sees fit, while ignoring the rules of science. Users can alter any item already considered real. Any decision made in the past, any item ever created, any movement, choice, color, atom, or molecule that exists can be changed. All of existence bends to the imagination of a reality warper. Users can rewrite the laws of physics and then change them back in an instant, universes can bend to the will of a reality warper. Examples include [[Void Manipulation|erasing things out of existence]], granting wishes, creating universes, [[Matter Manipulation|creating/altering matter]], [[Time Manipulation|time manipulation]], [[Spatial Manipulation|spatial manipulation]], etc.

==Possible Uses==
*Alter time
*Alter the elements
*Change probability
*Speak items, decisions, or events into reality
*Create new items or imagined items
*Give themselves or others new powers
*To wish hard enough that changes target decisions
*Changing a map rewrites the landscape
*Users may automatically return another powers changes like illusion or spatial manipulation to the original
*Cause paradoxes
*Randomize the universe
*Rewrite physics
*Users change where the universe around them sits putting them anywhere instantly, similar to teleportation
*Reverse constants, like falling equals going up or doctor means warrior
*Resurrect the dead
*Completely or partially erase things from existence
*Etc.

==Possible Mechanisms==
*[[Creation]]
*[[Matter Manipulation]]
*[[Magic]]
*[[Matter Manipulation#Quantum Manipulation|Quantum Manipulation]]
*[[Information Manipulation]]
*[[Spatial Manipulation]]
*[[Time Manipulation]]
*[[Physics Manipulation]]
*[[Conceptual Manipulation]]
*[[Plot Manipulation]]

==Users==
*Many characters such as [[Mister Mxyzptlk]] from [[DC Comics|DC/Vertigo Comics]]
*Many characters such as [[James Jaspers|Mad Jim Jaspers]] from [[Marvel Comics]]
*Many characters and technologies from [[Doctor Who]]
*Various characters from [[Tenchi Muyo!]]
*Many [[Pokémon]], mostly Psychic and legendaries, have low level reality warping
*Psykers, Daemons, Sorcerers and most other magical beings from [[Warhammer 40,000]]
*Several characters such as [[Illyria]], [[Willow Rosenberg|Willow]], and Anya from [[BuffyVerse]]
*[[Iwakura Lain]] (Serial Experiment Lain)
